entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum, whose seeds were infected by X. campestris

entities.name: XANTHOMONAS CAMPESTRIS
entities.description: The bacterial pathogen causing bacterial wilt in chickpea

entities.name: BACTERIAL WILT
entities.description: A seedborne infection that kills seeds before germination, seedlings after emergence, or causes progressive wilt in older plants

entities.name: HYDROGEN PEROXIDE
entities.description: A 30% solution used as a seed dipping treatment to control seedborne infection

entities.name: STREPTOCYCLINE
entities.description: An antibiotic (1000 p.p.m.) used in seed dipping to control seedborne infection

entities.name: GERMINATION
entities.description: The biological process of seed growth, which is negatively impacted by X. campestris but not by the treatments

entities.name: PLANT QUARANTINE UNIT
entities.description: The facility where the infected chickpea seeds were received for export
